assertions.assertion: A policy is defined that includes RequireClaim("scope", "catalog.write") for client-level authorization
assertions.rationale: Response shows policy.RequireClaim("scope", "catalog.write") in the policy definition

assertions.assertion: The same policy includes RequireRole("admin") or equivalent user-level claim check
assertions.rationale: Response shows policy.RequireRole("admin") in the same policy

assertions.assertion: The policy is applied to the DELETE /products/{id} endpoint
assertions.rationale: Response shows .RequireAuthorization("catalog-admin-delete") on the MapDelete endpoint

assertions.assertion: The response explains that scopes represent client permissions and roles/claims represent user permissions, and both should be checked
assertions.rationale: Response has a detailed 'Why Check Both Scope and Role?' section explaining scopes as client permissions, roles as user permissions, and why both must be checked
